examples: But I would like this life which moves and yearns in me, to be able itself to attain to comeliness, though but in transitory performance.
Butt I would like this life which moves and yearns in me, to be able itself to attain to comeliness, though but in transitory performance.
And thy renown went forth among the heathen for thy beauty: for it was perfect through my comeliness, which I had put upon thee, saith the Lord GOD.
